name: Open PR
instructions:
Create a pull request for the implementation.

1. Ensure branch is rebased on latest main with no conflicts
2. Write a concise PR title (< 70 chars, imperative mood)
3. PR body must include: summary of changes, test plan, and reference to the parent issue
4. If this is a feature track, link the design spec path

Do NOT merge — just open the PR and output 'done'.
